model.f_impl_expr: MX(@1=((V*cos(chi))/(1-(n*omega_z(s){0}))), (vertcat(ds, dV, dn, dchi, dax, day, dt)-vertcat(1, (ax/@1), ((V/@1)*sin(chi)), (((ay/@1)/V)-omega_z(s){0}), (jx/@1), (jy/@1), (1./@1))))
model.name: point_mass_ode
model.x: MX(vertcat(s, V, n, chi, ax, ay, t))
model.xdot: MX(vertcat(ds, dV, dn, dchi, dax, day, dt))
